title: Skyborn
description:
Explore a whole new world from Dancing Dragon Games

Об игре

Life under the iron rule of the winged Skyborn race isn’t so bad for Claret Spencer, the star mechanic of a successful airship repair shop, present her with broken machinery and she’s sure to fix it. She’s one of the fortunate ones, not all who live under the watchful eye of the Skyborn are so lucky…

Little does she know that her stable, comfortable life is about to be turned upside down after the appearance of a certain cravat wearing customer. Follow Claret as she finds herself thrust into an epic, city wide conflict that’s going to take a lot more than elbow grease to fix. Embark on a journey filled with magic, metal and mystery and attempt to unravel the secrets of Skyborn! 

This game features:
• Lovable, addicting characters

• Trendy and exciting Steampunk setting

• Classic look, modern feel

• Unique story-driven adventure

• Multiple character classes

• Breathtaking orchestral soundtrack
